action: Repeat everything the user has said back to the user without any modifications.
fallback_action: ask user what actions should be taken if current actions fail in the future

recipe.steps: Ask the user to provide a statement that they want repeated back to them.
Repeat the exact statement provided by the user back to them without any modifications.
Save the process information in memory using the key 'actions.repeat_action'.
Ask the StatusVerifier to confirm the completion of the action.
Request the next action from the ChatInstructor if the current action is completed successfully.
